channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Spain Wins 2026 FIFA World Cup with Historic Victory
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup, held across North America, concluded with Spain clinching the title after a dramatic final against Argentina. Spain's defensive record of conceding just one goal set a new ben...

item.title: Kenyatta University Graduate Advocates for Chinese Language Studies Amid Rising Opportunities
item.description: A Kenyatta University graduate who studied Chinese language opened up about why he chose the course at his graduation ceremony. The graduate argued that the increasing number of Chinese nationals comi...

item.title: New PM Andy Burnham outlines measures to tackle cost-of-living crisis and political instability
item.description: Prime Minister Andy Burnham has outlined his initial plans to address the UK's cost-of-living crisis, improve living standards, and end a decade of political instability. Following his appointment as ...

item.title: Madlanga commission continues investigating criminal justice system corruption
item.description: The Madlanga commission of inquiry, established to probe allegations of criminality, political interference, and corruption within South Africa's criminal justice system, is continuing its hearings. O...

item.title: Kelly Clarkson Shares Humorous Story About Health Scare from Contaminated Food During Vegas Show
item.description: Kelly Clarkson humorously recounted an awkward health scare during her Las Vegas residency, joking about suspecting cyclosporiasis after a recent show. The singer, 44, described rushing back to her ho...

item.title: AJK Elections to Be Held in Three Phases Starting July 27
item.description: The Chief Election Commissioner of Azad Jammu and Kashmir, Ghulam Mustafa Mughal, has announced that elections in the region will be conducted in three phases starting on July 27, 2026. The first phas...

item.title: Khampepe commission continues hearings into TRC cases
item.description: The Khampepe commission of inquiry, tasked with investigating alleged attempts to delay the prosecution of apartheid-era perpetrators, is holding hearings in Newtown, Johannesburg. The proceedings, wh...

item.title: Syd's New Album 'Beard' Marks a Mature Phase in Her Career
item.description: Syd, the Los Angeles-based artist, discusses her third solo album 'Beard', reflecting on her evolution from a cult figure to a Grammy-winning songwriter. The album, described as a 'coming-of-age roman...

item.title: Madonna's Rep Denies Rumors of Presence at Trump's World Cup Suite
item.description: Madonna's representatives have refuted claims that the singer was present in Donald Trump's luxury suite during the World Cup final. The rumor originated from a brief shot of Trump's box during the Sp...

item.title: Kileleshwa MCA Warns ODM May Be Aiding Gachagua Against Ruto's Government
item.description: Kileleshwa Member of County Assembly (MCA) Robert Alai has raised concerns about the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) potentially undermining President William Ruto's administration, allegedly in favo...

item.title: Philippines defends rights in West Philippine Sea amid China tensions
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. condemned the alleged assault by Chinese Coast Guard personnel on Filipino troops stationed at the BRP Sierra Madre in the West Philippine Sea, emphasizing th...

item.title: Supreme Court Adjourns Hearing on Sentence Suspension for Imaan and Hadi
item.description: The Supreme Court (SC) of Pakistan adjourned the hearing regarding the plea filed by Imaan Zainab Mazari-Hazir and her husband Hadi Ali Chattha against the Islamabad High Court's (IHC) decision to den...

item.title: Resurgence of White Australia policy ideas sparks immigration debate in Australia
item.description: The article explores the revival of discussions around the White Australia policy's legacy in contemporary Australian immigration debates. Political figures like Pauline Hanson and One Nation leader B...

item.title: PM Modi highlights 7.7% growth and youth achievements in parliamentary address
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi addressed Parliament ahead of the monsoon session, emphasizing India's 7.7% growth rate as a key achievement. He highlighted the country's status as the fastest-growing ma...

item.title: Zijin Mining Launches Four Ships to Enhance Critical Mineral Supply Route Through Tanzania
item.description: Zijin Mining, a Chinese company, has launched four new ships on Lake Tanganyika to transport minerals from the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) through Tanzania, strengthening China's control over c...

item.title: BCDA Leadership Crisis Intensifies Over Resignation Dispute and Directive Challenges
item.description: The Border Communities Development Agency (BCDA) is facing a leadership crisis as Dr Dakorinama Alabo George, the embattled Executive Secretary, claims President Tinubu’s directive requiring political...

item.title: Multiple arson cases in West Kelowna under investigation by RCMP
item.description: A series of suspicious fires broke out early Saturday morning in the West Kelowna area, leaving residents on edge after one blaze came within metres of a home. Four incidents occurred over four hours ...

item.title: Tanzania's agriculture struggles with slow growth and low productivity
item.description: Tanzania's agricultural sector, which employs most of the country's workforce and ensures food security, continues to underperform despite decades of policy reforms and investments. Two main challenge...

item.title: Horse racing tips and previews for Canterbury races
item.description: The article provides detailed race-by-race previews and betting tips for the Canterbury horse racing meetings on Wednesday. It highlights key contenders in each race, analyzing their form, jockey clai...

item.title: Claire Kelly: A Legacy of Mid-Century Hollywood Elegance
item.description: Claire Kelly (1931–1998) was an American actress and model renowned for her striking beauty and poised presence in mid-20th century Hollywood. Born in 1931, she rose to prominence during the 1950s and...
